observations.note: All 12 AC test suites pass (48/48 assertions pass). Test quality excellent with no anti-gaming violations.
Heuristic engine design is clear and scalable. Read-only constraint properly enforced via documentation.
Derivation Purity principle introduced - ensures generated references remain traceable to source context files.
Reference file demonstrates progressive disclosure pattern effectively. 260 lines with clear section structure.
Compliance verified: No Bash for file ops, no monolithic components, no hardcoded assumptions, read-only constraints enforced.
Optional enhancement: Add JSON example for structured output format to clarify field naming conventions (snake_case vs camelCase).
Consider YAML frontmatter for future consistency with skill/subagent files, though Markdown headers are appropriate for reference files.
Test suite structure follows best practices: AAA pattern, pre-condition checks, helper functions, clear result aggregation.
All 6 context files referenced by heuristics verified to exist. No broken references or circular dependencies.
Reference file is configuration artifact (not executable). No code smell detection applicable. Test coverage 100% sufficient.
